comment.body:
Chop Zone 5995 - 6035:
IF SPX stays between 5995 and 6035, THEN:
ong near 5995, targeting 6025/6035.
F fail near 6035, THEN target 6015 - 6000. Bullish Scenario:
IF SPX > 6010, THEN:
ntry: On a breakout or a retest
arget: 6025 round number
IF > 6035, THEN: 050 Magnet
IF over 6050, THEN: 060 and beyond, retrace back towards 6050

comment.body:
SHORT NOTE (as I'm doing classes rn):

Hidden vol selling is going under the hood. The effect just lags yet. 
You can see vol of vol being dumped (white) despite the second top in RV (purple).
Why? - Well, I explained yesterday the reflexiv nature of vol cycles.
This alone telling me without watching at VIX inventories, that customers are selling VIX options, that when they are hedged, it reflexively compresses SPX vomma. (I can also telling without looking into the inventories that these are sold puts by customers more than sold calls, bcs if it would be the other way around then vomma should catch up or at least stagnant as VIX dumps back, as foreshadowed in Sunday. Thats how hedging works...)
This compression of vol-of vol foreshadowing that SPX RV will also be compressed shortly. 
When this happens, you will see systematic reallocation by buying equities, supporting the market up🟢
+ triggers supportive vanna flow into OpEx.
